buildName: GLOBAL JOB STATE + MAP FLOW ENFORCEMENT
serverBehavior: server.cjs serves root app files and does not prefer stale dist/index.html
latestImportantFixes: v4.0.26 enforces global job state across all maps
Route lines show only during active movement: guard accepted / en route
Arrived, checking property, proof uploaded, completed, and report published no longer show guard-to-property route lines
Map cards are compact and professional for guards, companies, clients, properties, and addresses
v4.0.25 Agency Proof Review + Client Report Delivery preserved
Agency Admin proof/reports are framed as agency-owned, not platform dispatch-owned
Report publish attempts the existing Supabase report RPC and also writes a marketplace delivery copy for Bolt testing continuity
Client reports/tracker can read delivered report records after agency publish
v4.0.24 guard job-flow icon sync preserved
v4.0.22 proof upload RLS app changes preserved
v4.0.21 profile photo save fix preserved
v4.0.20 client marketplace status tracker preserved
